<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sp_instance_link"><sp_instance_link action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><advanced_placeholder_dimensions>false</advanced_placeholder_dimensions><async_load>false</async_load><async_load_device_type>desktop,tablet,mobile</async_load_device_type><async_load_trigger>viewport</async_load_trigger><class_name/><color>default</color><css/><glyph>upload</glyph><id/><kb_article/><kb_category/><kb_topic/><order>1</order><placeholder_dimensions>{	"mobile": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"desktop": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"tablet": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	}}</placeholder_dimensions><placeholder_dimensions_script><![CDATA[function evaluateConfig(options) { return {	"mobile": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"desktop": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"tablet": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	}}; }]]></placeholder_dimensions_script><placeholder_template><!-- 
	AngularJS template with configurable options.
	Use the `options` object to control dynamic behavior.
	Example: Display an element when max row count is 10:
	<div ng-if="options.maxRowCount === 10"></div>
	The `skeleton-container` class is used for loading placeholders.
-->
	<div class="skeleton-container">
	<!-- Header Skeleton -->
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-header"></div>
	<!-- Body Skeleton -->
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line"></div>
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line small"></div>
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line medium"></div>
</div></placeholder_template><preserve_placeholder_size>false</preserve_placeholder_size><roles/><sc_cat_item/><sc_category/><short_description/><size>md</size><sp_column display_value="1">721da6e1344803107f4481def36cc00c</sp_column><sp_page/><sp_widget display_value="Icon Link">3caa67afcb13020000f8d856634c9c2e</sp_widget><sys_class_name>sp_instance_link</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>pallavi.v</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-04 17:41:49</sys_created_on><sys_id>fcad22e1344803107f4481def36cc0a8</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Submit Assignment</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Student Assignment Tracker" source="x_cdltd_student_0">04a737e270b332107f44345fb425468a</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Student Assignment Tracker">04a737e270b332107f44345fb425468a</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sp_instance_link_fcad22e1344803107f4481def36cc0a8</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>pallavi.v</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-04 17:45:22</sys_updated_on><title>Submit Assignment</title><type>url</type><url>?id=sc_cat_item&sys_id=73843f4cf90003107f441308f89a42ee</url><widget_parameters><![CDATA[{
